name: What's an Independent Medical Eval?
description: An Independent Medical Evaluation (IME) is a medical examination performed by a doctor who has not been previously involved in your care. This evaluation is typ

acceptedAnswer.text: An Independent Medical Evaluation (IME) is a medical examination performed by a doctor who has not been previously involved in your care. This evaluation is typically requested by the insurance company to provide an objective assessment of your medical condition and its relation to your work injury.
